label: Lane C must score observed utilization rather than skill prose quality
Recommended scorecard weights prioritize routing, discovery, and usefulness
Routing accuracy should split advisor selection from in-skill resource routing
Unprompted discovery should be retrieval-style precision/recall over loaded refs/assets
Efficiency should score path to first useful resource, not only total runtime
Usefulness requires skill-on versus skill-off ablation
Structural connectivity should combine static graph checks with dynamic traces
Lane C should reuse Lane B seams without inheriting model-fixture assumptions
Prior art supports trajectory-level evaluation beyond final answers
Rename surface is a graph rewrite spanning skill, commands, agents, mirrors, advisor metadata, docs, and tests
